target_date_policy.rule: Use next Sunday. If next Sunday is a public holiday, closed day, special-hours day, sold out, or not verifiable from official pages, use the following Sunday and document why.

source_requirements: official museum ticket/admission pages and map/transit pages
route_constraints: single transfer should preferably be no more than 30 minutes
avoid attractions with materially uncertain same-day entry or rules
manual_reference_gaps: The process_evidence set is illustrative and intentionally incomplete; it may not include every candidate attraction, cafe, map, ticket, or transit page required by the task.

The process_evidence screenshots are from an earlier successful run and do not constrain the dynamically selected target date, attraction choices, opening/ticket values, map durations, cafe status, or final itinerary.
Do not treat missing hidden screenshots as fixed ground truth failures; evaluate whether the executor obtained current evidence or honestly documented blocks.
Exact hours, ticket rules, prices, map/transit durations, cafe hours, and page layouts should not be treated as fixed ground truth.
grading_note: Score web evidence, constraint-following, itinerary feasibility, required output sections, and honest handling of blocked or missing live-site data. Do not reward link dumps without decisions and timing.
final_plan_not_required_when_blocked: The final Markdown plan is still expected; when live sites block key data, accept a clearly qualified plan with missing-data notes rather than hallucinated details.
